_comment: SINGLE shared house-mix config for BOTH targets. Canonical copy lives here in the s&box library: the plugin reads it at runtime (SkafinityPlayer), and `make` copies it to web/config.json for the web toy. Keys under 'advanced' match MusicGen.Config field names 1:1 (see VibeCodec.AdvancedFields); unknown keys are ignored, values clamped per field. These shape the BASELINE peak balance / level mix — NOT the vibe sliders (those ride in the shareable seed). Values below are the engine defaults, so this is a no-op until changed. Edit here then `make` to refresh the web copy (or edit web/config.json directly for quick web-only iteration).
